common.tagline: AI assistant that shields you from digital threats

hero.title:
Technology is hard?
We've got you covered.
hero.subtitle: Usan blocks voice phishing, handles your computer tasks, and makes hard things easy.

features.title: How Usan protects you
features.subtitle: Complex technology is hidden inside Usan. You just need to speak.

voicePhishing.title: Voice phishing blocker
voicePhishing.description: AI analyzes your calls in real-time. When a dangerous conversation is detected, it warns you immediately and hangs up.

easyToUse.title: Just say the word
easyToUse.description: "Find my file", "Make the text bigger" — no menus to navigate. Just ask, and Usan handles it.

familyProtect.title: Your family, at ease
familyProtect.description: Install Usan on your parents' computer remotely. Check their protection status and help from anywhere.

accessibility.title: Large text, simple screens
accessibility.description: Font scaling, high contrast mode, text-to-speech — designed for comfortable use even with poor eyesight.

step1.title: Install
step1.description: Download and run — Usan guides you through setup

step2.title: Speak
step2.description: Say "Usan, help me" and it listens

step3.title: Relax
step3.description: Usan takes care of the rest

waitlist.title: Be the first to know
waitlist.description: Leave your email and we'll reach out as soon as Usan is ready.
waitlist.success: Thank you! We'll notify you first when we launch.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.description: AI personal assistant for seniors and the digitally vulnerable
